mda.capability-brief@mail.mil
To Report Fraud, Waste, or Abuse, Please Contact:
MDA Fraud, Waste & Abuse
Hotline: (256) 313-9699
mda.hotline@mail.mil
Other Contacts
Defense SBIR/STTR Innovation Portal
www.dodsbirsttr.mil
(external link opens in new window)
DoD SBIR/STTR Support
Questions about DoD announcements (BAAs), proposal preparation, electronic submission process, 
and other program related areas may be emailed to
DoDSBIRSupport@reisystems.com
DoD Inspector General (IG) Fraud, Waste & Abuse
Hotline: (800) 424-9098
hotline@dodig.mil
Successful prosecutions of Fraud, Waste, and Abuse, including those related to SBIR and STTR, can be found on the Department of Defense
Office of Inspector General website
(external link opens in new window)
